_meta.source: Materialized by dashboard/scripts/finance/heartbeat.py (Orchestrator) from modules/finance/fixtures/moneybird_medivara.json. Bound-agent overlay attached to each recurring line per moneybird.md §5.3 — `vendor`, `category`, and (optional) `confidence_marker` / `_anomaly_note` are the agent's categorization, not the connector's.
_meta.swap_to_real: Replace with snapshots/costs.json materialized from live Moneybird MCP reads once the bound Finance agent runs the recurring-cost categorization recipe against production data.

recurring._anomaly_note: Categorized as office-supplies in Moneybird; spend pattern + vendor name suggest saas-customer-success. Surfaces as an expense_recategorization recommendation candidate.
Subscription active but no usage signals in the last 3 months. Subscription-audit recommendations are forbidden in v1 per SPEC §4 — this is a flag, not a suggested action.
